cards.front: What is the geometric dual of a graph?
cards.back: A planar graph that contains all the faces of the original graph as its vertices

cards.front: What is the relationship between the number of vertices and vertices of the geometric dual of a planar graph?
What is the relationship between the number of edges of the geometric dual of a planar graph?
cards.back: They are equal to the number of faces of the original graph

cards.front: What is the geometric dual of a planar embedding of a graph?
cards.back: A planar embedding of the geometric dual of the graph

cards.front: Is the geometric dual of a graph planar?
cards.back: If the original graph is planar, then the geometric dual is also planar
